word: G4403 - πρύμνα - prýmna - proom'-nah - Hinder part

sections.paragraph:
- Original: πρύμνα

- Transliteration: Prumna

- Phonetic: proom'-nah

- Definition:

1. the stern or hinder part of the ship

- Origin: from prumnus (hindmost)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: Feminine of πρυμνύς prumnus (hindmost); the stern of a ship: - hinder part stern.
